rows: 提炼克服心魔类的固化情节内容
能够将克服心魔类的固化情节应用到篇章实战中
能够在不同篇章中复用相似的情节发展和情节内容

leading_in: 克服心魔类续写篇章如何通过最低限度的调整和修改，实现情节内容的迁移复用？

basic.tag: 【知识标签】读后续写之完全开放性质类

upgrade.tag: 【知识标签】读后续写之完全开放性质类
upgrade.zh: （尽管）已经失败了好几次，Eva 依旧咬牙坚持尝试，最终她做到了，一个接着一个记住了教学大楼里每一个房间的位置。
upgrade.en: Having failed several times, Eva struggled to keep trying and finally made it, memorizing the location of every room in the school building one after another.

basic.en: Eva jumped and shouted, "I did it!"

upgrade.zh: Eva一蹦老高，挥舞着拳头，高声呼喊：“我做到了！”
upgrade.en: Eva jumped high, waved her fists in the air and exclaimed loudly, "I did it!"

upgrade.zh: 我教练的脸上露出了一抹微笑，他轻轻拍了拍我的肩膀，然后朝我竖起了大拇指。
upgrade.en: A smile appeared on my coach’s face, and he gently patted my shoulder and then gave me a thumbs-up.

basic.en: Eva felt a strong sense of achievement.

upgrade.zh: 最终，看着已经被她征服的教学大楼，Eva感到自己的内心被成就感所占据。
upgrade.en: Eventually, looking at the school building she had conquered, Eva was overwhelmed with a sense of accomplishment.

upgrade.zh: 从那时起，我不再害怕任何看似困难的目标，因为这段经历给了我克服一切困难坚持下去的勇气和智慧。
upgrade.en: Since then, I was no longer afraid of any seemingly difficult goals, as the experience gave me the courage and wisdom to persist through every obstacle.

passage_en: ①  Eva spent the first week of high school trying to keep her head above water. One of the major headaches for her was finding her way in the huge school building. It was a six-story building. On each floor, hallways stretched in four directions, leading to classrooms, laboratories, and teachers' offices. Somewhere in the building, there was also a library, a cafeteria, and a gym.

②  Having a poor sense of direction, Eva found it impossible to get around in such a huge building. All the different hallways and rooms were too much to think about, let alone commit to memory. She decided that she would memorize where her classes were and then pretend that the rest of the place didn't exist.

③  In her first PE class, Eva was shocked when Coach Pitt announced that everyone had to run one mile around the track outside. She searched the faces of her classmates for signs of panic. There was nothing she feared more than having to run a whole mile. To Eva, "a mile" was used to describe long distances. It was ten miles from her home to her grandfather's, and that always seemed like a long way, even in a car!

④  When Coach Pitt blew his whistle (哨子), Eva figured she would be left in the dust. However, while some of her classmates edged ahead, others actually fell behind. "It's just the beginning," she thought. "I'll come in last for sure."

⑤  Soon Eva began to breathe hard, with her heart pounding and legs shaking. Feeling desperate, Eva started using a mind trick on herself. She stopped thinking about the word "mile". Instead, she focused on reaching the shadow cast on the track by an oak tree up ahead. Then she concentrated on jogging to the spot where the track curved (拐弯). After that, she tried to see if she could complete her first lap. One lap turned into two, then three, then four.

prompts.para1: Para 1: When Coach Pitt said "Nice work!" to her at the finish line, Eva was surprised.
prompts.para2: Para 2: Eva decided to use the same trick to deal with the school building.

details.label: 认可点赞
details.zh: Pitt教练的脸上露出了一抹微笑，他轻轻拍了拍Eva的肩膀，然后朝她竖起了大拇指。
details.tag: 【知识标签】个人情感与人际关系
details.en: A smile appeared on Coach Pitt’s face, and he gently patted Eva’s shoulder and then gave her a thumbs-up.

details.label: 欢呼鼓掌
details.zh: 原来，Eva竟成为了最早抵达终点线的那群人之一。Eva的同学们纷纷为她爆发出热烈的掌声和欢呼声。
details.tag: 【知识标签】读后续写之完全开放性质类
details.en: It turned out that Eva was one of the first to reach the finish line. Her classmates burst into warm applause and cheers for her.

details.label: 挥拳庆祝
details.zh: 她一蹦老高，挥舞着拳头，高声呼喊：“我做到了！”
details.tag: 【知识标签】读后续写之完全开放性质类
details.en: Eva jumped high, waved her fists in the air and exclaimed loudly, "I did it!"

details.label: 突然明白
details.zh: 等过了一会儿她回过神来，回想着刚才的经历，她想到了一个好主意。
details.tag: 【知识标签】读后续写之完全开放性质类
details.en: When she came to her senses after a moment and reflected on her experience, a brilliant idea dawned on her.

details.label: 拆分目标
details.zh: 每一天，Eva都为自己设立一个小目标，探索一个新的房间，并想办法记住那个房间的位置和路线。
details.tag: 【知识标签】读后续写之完全开放性质类
details.en: Every day, Eva set a small goal for herself, explored a new room and managed to remember the location and route of that room.

details.label: 坚持克服
details.zh: （尽管）已经失败了好几次，Eva 依旧咬牙坚持尝试，最终她做到了，一个接着一个记住了教学大楼里每一个房间的位置。
details.tag: 【知识标签】记叙文写作之写事
details.en: Having failed several times, Eva struggled to keep trying and finally made it, memorizing the location of every room in the school building one after another.

details.label: 满足情绪
details.zh: 最终，看着已经被她征服的教学大楼，Eva感到自己的内心被成就感所占据。
details.tag: 【知识标签】读后续写之完全开放性质类
details.en: Eventually, looking at the school building she had conquered, Eva was overwhelmed with a sense of accomplishment.

details.label: 美满结局
details.zh: 从那时起，Eva不再害怕任何看似困难的目标，因为这段经历给了她克服一切困难坚持下去的勇气和智慧。
details.tag: 【知识标签】读后续写之完全开放性质类
details.en: Since then, Eva was no longer afraid of any seemingly difficult goals, as the experience gave her the courage and wisdom to persist through every obstacle.

passage_en: ①  I gazed down the frightening snow-covered slope, my heart beating wildly. The accident that took my leg two years ago replayed in my mind, a memory I couldn’t escape. But with my prosthetic leg (假肢) and persistent training, I was determined to return to the slopes.

②  It was my final training session before the competition. As I practiced the difficult jump, the world went black as I crashed headfirst into the densely packed snow. I rolled down the slope like a man trapped in a washing machine, unable to break free from the tossing and flipping. When I finally stopped, I found my prosthetic leg had been forced out of its place.

③  “I can’t do this!” I yelled, hammering my leg back into place. I freed myself from the snowboard and struggled to my feet. “Another round?” my coach asked with a soft laugh. He rested his arm on my shoulder as if to comfort me after his teasing. We both stared at the towering slope ahead. Failure loomed over me like a dark cloud — it had beaten me too many times before.

④  “I can’t handle the landing. This leg drags me down. How am I supposed to compete tomorrow?” I slammed my leg repeatedly with bitterness as tears welled up in my eyes. Every time I fell, I forced myself to get back on my feet so that I could snowboard again, but I had tricked myself into believing that I could return to being a professional snowboarder.

⑤  “Just remember: dig your heels in, bend your knees, and keep your arms up. Three steps to the gold medal.” My coach looked me straight in the eyes, his voice firm yet warm. “It’s not your leg holding you back. You’re using it as an excuse.” His words trailing off like droplets of water forming dotted indents in the snow — disappearing into the snow forever but leaving their marks behind.

prompts.para1: Para 1: The fateful day finally arrived.
prompts.para2: Para 2: The crowd erupted, cheers filling the air.

details.label: 紧张情绪
details.zh: 站在赛场之上，我感到胃里一阵翻腾，厚厚手套里的手心已经完全湿透。
details.en: Standing on the field, I felt my stomach twist, and my palms were all wet inside the thick gloves.

details.label: 初时僵硬
details.zh: 起初，我的身体因恐惧而僵硬，刺骨的寒风在我的脸上像刀子一样掠过。
details.tag: 【知识标签】读后续写之完全开放性质类
details.en: At first, my body frozen with fear, I felt the piercing cold wind sweep across my face like a blade.

details.label: 坚持克服
details.zh: （尽管）已经数次未能摆脱这种情绪，我依旧咬牙坚持尝试，最终我做到了，让自己沉浸到比赛本身之中，一个又一个闯过了赛道上的难关。
details.tag: 【知识标签】读后续写之完全开放性质类
details.en: Having failed several times, I struggled to keep trying and finally made it, immersing myself in the competition and overcoming the obstacles on the track one by one.

details.label: 奋力一跃
details.zh: 直到那个熟悉的高坡再次出现在我的面前，我的肌肉再次紧绷，强迫自己忘记一切恐惧和犹豫，几乎是在身体本能的指挥下奋力一跃。
details.tag: 【知识标签】读后续写之完全开放性质类
details.en: Until that familiar steep slope appeared before me again, my muscles tensed up once more. Forcing myself to forget all fear and hesitation, I almost leaped forward under the command of pure instinct.

details.label: 挥拳庆祝
details.zh: 我甚至一时都没意识到自己成功落地，直到冲过了终点线。回过神来，我一蹦老高，挥舞着拳头，高声呼喊：“我做到了！”
details.tag: 【知识标签】读后续写之完全开放性质类
details.en: I didn't even realize I had landed successfully until I crossed the finish line. Coming to my senses, I jumped high, waved my fists in the air, and shouted loudly, "I did it!"

details.label: 认可点赞
details.zh: 我教练的脸上露出了一抹微笑，他轻轻拍了拍我的肩膀，然后朝我竖起了大拇指。
details.tag: 【知识标签】读后续写之完全开放性质类
details.en: A smile appeared on my coach’s face, and he gently patted my shoulder and then gave me a thumbs-up.

details.label: 满足情绪
details.zh: 最终，看着已经被我征服的高坡，我感到自己的内心被成就感所占据。
details.tag: 【知识标签】读后续写之完全开放性质类
details.en: Eventually, looking at the steep slope I had conquered, I was overwhelmed with a sense of accomplishment.

details.label: 美满结局
details.zh: 从那时起，我不再害怕任何看似困难的目标，因为这段经历给了我克服一切困难坚持下去的勇气和智慧。
details.tag: 【知识标签】读后续写之完全开放性质类
details.en: Since then, I was no longer afraid of any seemingly difficult goals, as the experience gave me the courage and wisdom to persist through every obstacle.
